project_privacy_data_flows.description: User creates a new note. Content encrypted via libsodium before storage in SQLite database. Editor loaded from local assets in WebView.

flow_steps.details: User opens editor to create or edit a note. Editor WebView loaded from local assets (file:///android_asset/index.html).
Editor WebView loads HTML/JS editor from local app assets. All editing happens locally.
Note content stored in SQLite database encrypted with libsodium-derived key at file level.

flow_steps.code: const password = generatePassword(); const derivedDatabaseKey = await Sodium.deriveKey(password, NOTESNOOK_DB_KEY_SALT);
flow_steps.details: 80-character random key generated using react-native-get-random-values. Key derived via libsodium and stored in Android KeyStore.
